summary: Iteration 14: Screenshot Import feature using GPT-4o vision model - All tests PASSED. Backend APIs (POST /api/extract/client and POST /api/extract/case) working correctly with GPT-4o integration via emergentintegrations. Frontend 'Import from Screenshots' buttons verified in both New Client and New Case dialogs.

issues: Minor chart sizing warning in console (width/height -1) - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

seed_data_creation: Test images generated programmatically with PIL for backend testing (not persisted)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Screenshot Import feature fully tested. Backend endpoints use emergentintegrations LlmChat with GPT-4o model. Images preprocessed with PIL (contrast 1.4x, median filter, resize to max 2000px). Single API call processes multiple images. Frontend ScreenshotImport component integrated in both Clients.js and Cases.js with data-testid='import-screenshots-btn' and data-testid='screenshot-file-input'. Login requires using correct data-testid selectors (login-email-input, login-password-input, login-submit-btn).

1_backend_extract_client_endpoint.details: POST /api/extract/client returns extracted_data JSON with client fields (first_name, last_name, email, phone, dob, address, postcode, employment_type, income) and screenshots_processed count

2_backend_extract_case_endpoint.details: POST /api/extract/case returns extracted_data JSON with case fields (lender_name, loan_amount, property_value, interest_rate, etc.) and screenshots_processed count

3_backend_auth_requirement.details: Both endpoints require authentication, return 401 without valid token

5_backend_multiple_images.details: Multiple images processed in single GPT-4o API call, screenshots_processed reflects actual count

6_backend_null_fields.details: Fields that cannot be extracted are returned as null (not guessed)

7_backend_image_preprocessing.details: Large images (3000x3000) resized and processed successfully. JPEG format works correctly.

8_frontend_client_import_button.details: Import from Screenshots button (data-testid='import-screenshots-btn') found and visible in Add New Client dialog

9_frontend_case_import_button.details: Import from Screenshots button found and visible in Create New Case dialog

10_frontend_file_input.details: Hidden file input (data-testid='screenshot-file-input') present for JPG/PNG upload
